full_description: FitPal is a workout tracking app that helps users track their exercise routines and monitor their progress. It provides a simple and customizable way to log workouts and track fitness goals. With FitPal, you can easily record your daily workouts, set reminders, and view your progress over time. The app also allows you to customize your workout routine, set goals, and track your nutrition. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced athlete, FitPal is the perfect tool to help you achieve your fitness goals. Download FitPal now and start tracking your way to a healthier, happier you!
